title: Animal cloning: State of ART
author: Pratap Gore1, S.S Gaonkar2, M. Karunakaran2, Mohan Mondal4
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Introduction    
  Reproductive cloning is defined as the deliberate production of genetically identical individuals, in simple terms creating an identical genetic copy of one organism like xerox copy.
steps_raw:
